entry.title: Re: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content:
Hi roland, it's failing to open with below error

After the above, I commented the line "-vmargs" and ran eclipse, which forced me to reinstall the HANA tools. However, the problem still persists.

entry.title: Time Types of different Categories in the same Story Report table
entry.content: The requirement is that the time type of category absence and attendance are all shown in one Story filter and the User can pick a any time type and gets the start time and end time. My guess is that this is not possible because it depends on the primary source of the story query or in depends on the category, since either all attendances/absences are in one separate filter but they cannot be combined in one filter.

entry.title: Re: Hi there, I have the following case with Material Sub...
entry.content:
486680 - Material substitution: No structure explosion

https://me.sap.com/notes/486680/E

 

According to this OSS Note this double explosion is not possible

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation

@kanchanarao 

Hi Kanchanarao,

Marcos

entry.title: Re: Notas SAP para a Reforma Tributária
entry.content:
Olá a todos.

Pegando carona na postagem da Michelle, a SAP lançou uma nota (3563053) com exigência das versões mínimas a partir desse ano.

No nosso caso aqui, estamos na 618 SP 08. No entanto, conforme a nota acima, o mínimo seria SP 13. Mas mesmo assim a SAP liberou as duas notas já existentes, para Reforma Tributária, dessa exigência.

Fico na dúvida se, em algum momento, a SAP resolve voltar atrás, impedindo assim que várias empresas que não atendes às exigências mínimas, de aplicar notas importantes como as da Reforma. 

 

Nota (3563053) com exigência das versões mínimas:

Estamos na versão 618 SP 08. SAP liberou a nota da RT da exigência acima:

entry.title: Re: SBO Mailer from Opportunity screen, not showing the m...
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't know for sure. But it seems to me that this is a business rule of the system. Because when you have a sales order, you wan't to send it to your customer, but when you just have the opportunity, you are still in negotiation, so Sales Opportunity is more a document for your internal control, and because of that you will want to send the email "by default" to the owner of this negotiation. 

Anyway, you can still manually add the customer to receive the e-mail.

Best regards

entry.title: 📣‌ SAP Emarsys: Q1 2025 Product Release 📣‌
entry.content:
Happy New Year! 🥂 

I know the end of February may be a bit late to still be saying that, but this is technically my first post of 2025, so I’m going to relish saying it one last time!

Each new year inevitably brings change, excitement and opportunity for improvement. It’s on that note that I'm pleased to share the highlights from an already busy and exciting start to 2025 at SAP Emarsys.  

But first, if you noticed a slightly different look and feel about Emarsys, you’re not just imagining things. To kick off the year, we rebranded to SAP Emarsys including a fresh new logo, color palette, and imagery. But it’s not just cosmetic, we’ve applied the SAP style throughout the product UI and experience and even moved our product documentation to the SAP Help Portal to take advantage of the powerful capabilities of the knowledge base. Read more about our rebrand here. 

What hasn’t changed is our commitment to helping our customers deliver omnichannel excellence at scale and achieve business outcomes. So, with that let’s dive into our Q1 product release, jam-packed with impactful updates and innovative new features to increase productivity, simplify delivering exceptional customer experiences, and help you generate revenue and results more efficiently. 

Extensible, Scalable Platform Updates 

To deliver meaningful customer engagements in the moments that matter, you must be able to connect, manage, and activate your data from source and to any channel. Our latest extensible platform updates help you do just that: 

Connect to data from anywhere: 

  • Batch Sales Data API (Pilot): Simplify large scale sales data loads, now with self-service configuration and data quality monitoring tools 
  • Engagement Events (Pilot): Connect to events from any source to power segmentation, personalization and real-time marketing engagements 
  • Account Engagement: B2B marketers using SAP Emarsys and Sales Cloud can now see a simplified overview of account data and begin to target key groups with the Account Fact Sheet and Account-based Segmentation 

Activate across your ecosystem: 

  • Digital Ads with Criteo: Build ad audiences from SAP Emarsys data and activate on commerce and content publisher sites 
  • Mercaux: In-Store Tactics: Notify store associates about key customer events to take action 

Additionally, we’ve rolled out several features which will help customers get the most out of SAP Emarsys whether your business is expanding or you’re already operating at scale. 

  • Consent Management Tool: Gives admins control to review and accept terms to enable key features, like the popular AI-Assisted Subject Line Generator 
  • Asset Tagging: Offers an efficient way to categorize and filter your assets  
  • Embedded SAP Support Ticketing: Enables SAP customers to open and manage support tickets directly from SAP Emarsys 
  • Accelerated Adoption Services Package for SAP Emarsys: A new offering with dedicated experts to help you make the most of your investment 

Intelligent, Omnichannel Innovations 

Omnichannel and personalization remain at the heart of what we do, which is reflected in many of the updates in this release enhancing marketers’ capacity to execute their strategies and engage with customers how and where they prefer to interact.  

Content & Channel Innovations 

  • Omnichannel Content Blocks: Our new standard for building and distributing content across channels adds support for In-app messaging and a new Brand Center (pilot) 
  • Mobile Messaging: Updates include enhanced segmentation with Mobile App & SMS data plus the ability to use Multiple Short Codes in a Single Account  
  • Mobile Wallet: Scale campaign creation with a Copy Campaign button, segment based on Mobile Wallet data (pilot), and push notifications when passes are updated (pilot) 
  • Conversational Channel: Support more languages with use of the IETF field, expand use cases with support for Mobile Wallet campaigns, add interactivity with CTA buttons for WhatsApp, engage in dynamic dialogue with Conversational Messaging (pilot), and measure the impact with revenue attribution 

AI-powered intelligence and personalization 

  • AI-Assisted Product Finder (Pilot): Utilize natural language search to curate the right products for your campaign 
  • AI-Assisted Report Builder (Pilot): Query your data and build ad-hoc reports with the help of generative AI 
  • Email Domain Reporting: Get improved visibility into domain performance and spot potential deliverability issues with a refreshed report UI and new functionality 

 

Did I mention that the Product & Engineering teams have been busy? If you'd like to learn more about these features, how they work, and the value you can realize: 

  • Read the full product release blog 
  • Explore the full details on the product release page 
  • Register for the Q1 2025 Emarsys Release Webinar on February 27th  

And if you are interested in joining one of the active pilots or early adopter programs, please submit your request or reach out to your SAP Customer Success Partner (CSP) or SAP Emarsys Customer Success Manager (CSM).

entry.title: Re: SAP Intelligence - Delete processes, but that the pip...
entry.content: In addition, is it possible to reduce the number of cases in a process, e.g. by filtering out certain activities or possibly shortening the time period queried?

entry.title: Re: initiallyVisibleFields SmartTable property not workin...

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content: I am very much interested, please let me know if there is any vacant. Karthick - Technology Architect

entry.title: Re: Notas SAP para a Reforma Tributária
entry.content:
Olá a todos.

Aplicamos as duas notas já liberadas, referente à Reforma Tributária: 3552901 e 3552903.

A nota 3552901, dentre outras coisas, inclui 4 novos IDs de Grupo de Impostos no domínio J_1BTAXGRP (IBSS, IBSM, CBS e IS).
Mas quando o cliente possui o módulo de Oil, nosso caso, este domínio possui um append (OIH_CV_BR_J_1BTAXGRP_FVA).
Neste caso a nota se perde e acaba excluindo IDs pré existentes (WACO, WACS, WAIR e II).

Pelo o que entendi, a rotina move todos os IDs originais 4 posições para baixo, para inserir os novos no topo. No entanto ocorre uma sobreposição dos 4 últimos do domínio J_1BTAXGRP, os mesmos citados acima (WACO, WACS, WAIR e II), com os primeiros do append OIH_CV_BR_J_1BTAXGRP_FVA. É nesse momento que o programa se perde e estes acabam ficando de fora.

Mais alguém passou por isso? A SAP tem conhecimento deste problema? Busquei nota e não encontrei nada.
Agradeço desde já.

Em tempo: a versão do nosso produto é SAP_APPL 618, SP 08.

Agradeço desde já qualquer ajuda.

entry.title: Consumption reversal fails from CO13 for missing entry in /SCWM/TIMBWA. Reason CSMO not determined.
entry.content:
In S/4HANA 2023, the consumption reversal (262) triggered via CO13 fails with error message "No entry found in table /SCWM/TIMBWA for key I" /SCWM/WM_SEL 009. 

The system search an entry in the /SCWM/TIMBWA with Reason blank and Direction I and finds nothing.

The Reason should be " CSMO - Consumption to Order".

EWM is embedded and synchronous movements are active.

How can I solve it?

entry.title: Re: Component Structure - Change
entry.content:
Hello All, As we can not change the "From cost element", how can we remove the a particular GL from that cost component.

Lets say my client say instead of Direct Material, client wants to break the component in RM and SFG Assuming I want to use the GLs provided by SAP standard, how can I do this Thanks

entry.title: Alerts not working after upgrade to version 10
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a user-defined alert that stopped working after upgrading to version 10. After going through some documentation/forums, they mentioned Job Service-Alert entry: Log on to the SLD. Under the Services tab, make sure that the Job Service-Alert entry and its URL is present.
Is this different from the Job Service? 

The status under mailer settings are starting.. but when I test the connection it says ok.

On the Alert and Scheduling tab the SAP B1 user is workflow and not AlertSvc. I also dont have the option to choose the company/schema where the alert should run.

Should this be reconfigured so the alerts can work again? If so, please can you let me know how.

We are on SAP Business One 10 for HANA, FP2208

Thank you.
Jerusha

entry.title: Can we use Succession Fields as criteria for Eligibility Rules?
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

I have an unusual question. My client has repurposed the Succession field reasonForLeaving, and would want it to be a criteria for a Compensation Eligibility rule. However, I cannot find reasonForLeaving (or its new label) under the available base objects for Comp eligibility rules. Is this expected behavior? Any possible workarounds if that is the case?

entry.title: Cancelar Nota de Saída (Nenhum registro concordante encontrado NFN4)
entry.content:
Ao tentar cancelar uma Nota Fiscal de Saída, a o erro Nenhum registro concordante encontrado '' (NFN4) (ODBC -2028) [Mensagem 131-183] aparece. Fiz uma consulta nessa tabela e percebi que se trata de sequência, mas todas elas estão configuradas.

Foram 4 notas sendo canceladas, 3 deu certo, apenas essa em questão deu erro.

Não houve atualização de sistema entre os cancelamentos.

entry.title: Re: Rules and Validations in SAP C4C
entry.content:
Hi @abimanyu_g 

Many thanks for your helpful and informative blog!

I have a requirement where I need to set the "Main" button for contacts as read-only. Unfortunately, the system does not support a standard read-only flag for this field.
As a workaround, I tried creating a rule and assigning a validation rule with an error message. However, it is not working, and I am struggling to implement the correct logic to trigger the error message when a user changes the "Main" flag, preventing the system from saving the modification.

Do you have any advice for me?

This is the code I currently have (which is not triggering the error message):
IF(Root.CurrentDefaultHasContactPerson.RelationshipBusinessPartnerUUID == Root.LastChangeDateTime == NOW(), true, false)

Many thanks in advance for your response - I appreciate your support! 🙂

Best regards,
Luana

entry.title: Re: Why on earth doesn't HANA BINTOTEXT() work on STXL.CL...
entry.content: I believe the data is stored in a compressed format (no idea of what internally the system uses). Its effectively a BLOB and only the application knows how to decode and process the actual data stored in it, so you have to go through the READ_TEXT FM to process it to return it as an internal table of lines of text. The way it is processed internally by the system it may be stored in the DB as multiple rows with the same ID depending on the size of the text being stored.

entry.title: Xsuaa and approuter in hybrid testing: POST request completed w/status 401 Authentication required
entry.content:
Hello!

 

I am hybrid testing a project where I am using xsuaa and approuter. However, I get this error in approuter log: POST request to /odata/v4/account/callExternalAPI completed with status 401 Authentication required
Here the configurations:
 

 

 

 

 

Service definition
service AccountService {
    
    entity TestEntity {
        key ID : UUID;
        Name   : String;
    }

    action callExternalAPI() returns String;
}<div><div><span>CDS configuration for hybrid testing in package.json project file:<li-code lang="json">{
...
  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",
      "destinations": true,
      "[hybrid]": {
        "auth": "xsuaa"
      }
    }
  }
}<div><div><span>xs-secutiry.json project file:<li-code lang="json">{
  "xsappname": "testvscode1",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "scopes": [],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": [],
  "authorities-inheritance": true,
  "oauth2-configuration": {
    "redirect-uris": [
      "http://localhost:5001/"
    ]
  }
}<p> <span>default-env.json approuter file:<li-code lang="json">{
    "PORT": 5001,
    "destinations": [
      {
        "name": "srv-api",
        "url": "http://localhost:4004",
        "forwardAuthToken": true
      }
    ]
  }

 

 

 

 

 

xs-app.json approuter file:

 

 

 

 

{
    "authenticationMethod": "none",
    "routes": [
      {
        "source": "^/app/(.*)$",
        "target": "$1",
        "localDir": ".",
        "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
      },
      {
        "source": "^/appconfig/",
        "localDir": ".",
        "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
      },
      {
        "source": "^/odata/v4/account/(.*)$",
        "target": "/odata/v4/account/$1",
        "destination": "srv-api",
        "csrfProtection": false
      },
      {
        "source": "^/(.*)$",
        "target": "$1",
        "destination": "srv-api",
        "csrfProtection": false
      }
    ]
  }

 

 

 

 

To run the test I am using the following commands:
- cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router --> to execute approuter
- cds watch --profile hybrid --> to execute the developed CAP service
 
I execute these requests in Postman:
- https : // <org> . authentication . us10 . hana . ondemand . com / oauth / token to get the bearer token
- http : // localhost : 5001 / odata / v4 / account / callExternalAPI to call the action, including the token from the previous request
 
 
 
However, I the error mentioned below:
#2.0#2025 02 20 09:50:13:982#-03:00#ERROR#/Handler#####1452e28d-b331-4350-98be-2eab93f6ed6f####Sc8PKx7C2gRnIK6lc1gQnwHU4MmHRGd2######m7dcayxl#PLAIN##POST request to /odata/v4/account/callExternalAPI completed with status 401 Authentication required#
 
What am I missing in the configuration?

Thanks for your time and help.

Regards!

Mig

entry.title: Re: How the ABAP Test Cockpit supports you to adopt ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hallo Olga,

we want to setup central ATC on BTP to scan all connected S/4 and cloud systems.

S/4 Systems at the moment are scanned by central ATC onPrem.

Comparing the check variants the available checks on BTP in our custom check variants are less than in check variants onPrem. Also comparing the standard check variant example ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT with our custom check variant there is a big difference of available checks. I assume this is caused by Language Version of package S_CODE_Inspector has "Standard ABAP" but our main package has "ABAP for Cloud Development".

So we're not able to activate all checks which we used to have in onPrem central ATC.

Is there any possibility to have full scope of checks available for our custom check variants ?

Thanks a lot !

Volker

entry.title: Re: Easy Price Maintenance in SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Please note that the suggested number of line items in this Blog do not apply and my cause considerable performance issues.

 

For optimum performance, the number of line items in a Price List or Discount List should be limited to around 10000 or less. When you check the affected Price List, you can see that the number of line items exceeds 10000 and hence, the error occurs.

 

See also the following relevant KBA’s for this Topic:

KBA 3079750 - Error When Opening, Downloading, Extracting or Querying Price List or Discount List

KBA 2614379 - Error Faced During Price List Upload

KBA 3460889 - Unable to Release Price Lists Consistently When the Number of Items over 10000

KBA 2218922 - Cannot Migrate Price List When the Price List is Too Huge

 

Best Regards,

Kathrin

entry.title: SAP SCT - set up and maintenance of Standard Organizational Structures in the CPE
entry.content:
Hello,

I cannot find the app in which the set up and the maintenance of the standard organizational structures are performed as per the learning: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/administering-sustainability-control-tower/setting-up-sap-sustainability-control-tower_d2a43808-e3c3-41de-8d21-5bcebd9ad1f1

I should see this view on my screen, where the selection of the organizational structure can be selected:

Does anyone have a clue on the app to run to see this?

Thank you so much for your time.

 

Best regards,

Linda

entry.title: Create ABAP program to send SQL command to another HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any possibility to create an ABAP program for instance with a select screen where we can write a SQL command then execute this SQL command into x hana DB ?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: Mentoring - Meant to Be!
entry.content: Is this an advertising blog?

entry.title: Please vote 341529 -Request to bring Latest People Profile/Full Profile Categories into RBP purview
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Currently in the Latest People Profile's Full Profile, there is no way to control/manage Categories and Cards in the RBP. This is unnecessarily showing Categories and Cards, especially not relevant for the users' themselves and also when users' seeing others' data, they see all categories and cards too. They may not have access to see the data, but this is a very poor design, user experience and going backwards. This will cause unnecessary confusion to the users and effort to admins in terms of queries. 

Please vote customer influence ID 341529 if you think this will benefit your company in this journey. There is some cards related suggestions as well. 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/341529/?section=sectionDetails

Regards - DRP

SAP SuccessFactors Platform   SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central  #SUCCESSFACTORS ROLES

entry.title: Please vote 341529 -Request to bring Latest People Profile/Full Profile Categories into RBP purview
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Currently in the Latest People Profile's Full Profile, there is no way to control/manage Categories and Cards in the RBP. This is unnecessarily showing Categories and Cards, especially not relevant for the users' themselves and also when users' seeing others' data, they see all categories and cards too. They may not have access to see the data, but this is a very poor design, user experience and going backwards. This will cause unnecessary confusion to the users and effort to admins in terms of queries. 

Please vote customer influence ID 341529 if you think this will benefit your company in this journey. There is some cards related suggestions as well. 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/341529/?section=sectionDetails

Regards - DRP

SAP SuccessFactors Platform   SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central  #SUCCESSFACTORS ROLES

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Day 2 Operations for Your SAP BTP Apps: Overview session for Experts and Beginners
entry.content: Will this be live on YouTube channel?

entry.title: massenlöschung von veralteten Rollen
entry.content:
Hallo,

ich muss massenweise veraltete Rollen löschen, jedoch funktioniert das ganze nicht so ganz.

Über die Transaktion pfcgmassdelete kann ich zwar einige Rollen löschen, bekomme aber diese Fehlermeldung, wenn bestimmte Rollen in den mitgegeben Werten enthalten sind:

Ich habe über die agr_1250 Tabelle herausgefunden, dass einige Rollen beim Objekt S_CODE öfters das gleiche Profil hinterlegt haben.

In manchen Fällen funktioniert es dann, wenn ich in der pfcg in die Rolle reingehe,  "Expertenmodus zur Profilgenerierung -> alten Stand lesen und mit den neuen Daten abgleichen" klicke, und die Rolle dann generiere. Nach diesen Schritten sind die Rollen neu abgemischt und ich kann sie dann ohne weitere Probleme löschen.

Jedoch gibt es da zwei große Probleme:
1. sind es extrem viele Rollen, sodass es keinen Sinn macht das händisch zu machen

2. dieses Vorgehen funktioniert nicht bei allen Rollen, die den S_TCODE mehrfach vergeben haben.

Meine Frage ist also, kennt jemand einen Weg, um massenweise Rollen abzumischen? Hatte schonmal jemand mit ähnlichen Problemen zutun gehabt? Weiß jemand warum das abmischen bei manchen Rollen funktioniert und bei manchen nicht?

Bin für jede Hilfe dankbar.

entry.title: Re: Hide "Unnamed Object" text in item table
entry.content:
The best way is to modify the data on the service/CDS. 

If you are in S/4HANA Cloud, my idea can be to hide that column with the annotation and create a new one custom.
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/28e95702b5854b938ac51c4bc2d078ab
Or you can try to modify the event and manipulate the data:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/382a6c39fd494c12a4ee23c8659909bd
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extension-of-fiori-elements-list-report-object-page-using-northwind-service/ba-p/13497696#:~:text=core%3AFragmentDefinition%3E-,In%20controller%20file%3A,-onBeforeRebindTableExtension%3Afunction

entry.title: How to migrate DIR attachments (physical files) from one SAP instance to another.
entry.content: How to migrate DIR attachments (physical files) from one SAP instance to another. Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: RAP On-Stack Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
@SampathReddy  You can use node extensibility concept here by extending CDS View and relevant objects of the sales order BO.

For sales order there is a RAP BO Interface available and it is released for extensibility

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_SALESORDERTP

More information on RAP Node extensibility can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/7ce1e3fc4cdf45a99d6c57cf7fcf271c.html
I have also showed node extensibility in my presentation in above youtube link.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps.
entry.content: Is it in the free account? Did you try with a different location?

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 3: SAP BTP guidance framework
entry.content:
In this episode we introduce the SAP Business Technology Platform's guidance framework, which offers various PDF guides and documentation tailored to different personas, including architects, developers, and administrators. While these resources provide valuable insights, it doesn’t capture everything. It can serve as a start point or a base line and it is definitely an interesting source and read for resources working on SAP BTP.

Takeaways

  • SAP Business Technology Platform provides guidance through various PDFs and documentation.
  • Guidance is available for multiple personas, such as Architects, Developers, and Administrators.
  • Different guides cater to different roles within the SAP ecosystem.
  • It's recommended to explore the guidance framework for a solid foundation in SAP technologies.
  • The SAP BTP guidance framework can be found here: What is the SAP BTP Guidance Framework? | SAP Help Portal
  • The guidance framework doesn't capture everything; it serves as a starting point.
  • Consider other sources of information to complement the guidance framework.
  • We are hosting sessions and workshops to help customers understand the content more deeply.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
Other users have the same issue:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/hi-i-am-not-able-to-subscribe-to-sap-build-apps-using-trial-account-it/qaq-p/14018791

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays onl...
entry.content:
Hi Again,

R&D had another look at what you are doing and suggested using this rather that 100%:

If the BestFitPage was set to False, then you had to specify the detailed Width/Height value like below:

BestFitPage="false" Height="1200px" ToolPanelView="None" Width="1600px" 

See if that resolves your issue...

Don

entry.title: Re: Consuming data from SAP Datasphere into Power BI via ODBC connector
entry.content:
@Max_Post any updates for yout try to import measures from the analytic model? I am currently facing the same issue. 

kind regards, 

Nico

entry.title: Re: Create ABAP program to send SQL command to another HANA DB
entry.content:
Why not use the SQL Console for SAP HANA to execute queries against SAP HANA databases?

Have you talked to your security officer about SQL injection?

entry.title: Re: Implementing BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE
entry.content:
This is old but adding information here because we went through the same.

The answer is in function module documentation for EXTENSIONIN parameter.

The fields added by Fiori Custom fields app are added to a different structure.

Example, to populate item customer fields

DATA: 
  lt_extensionin TYPE bapiparex_tab, 
  lt_ctitem_custfields TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF mmpur_oa_bapi_item_ext, 
  lwa_ctitem_custfields TYPE mmpur_oa_bapi_item_ext. 

* After filling LT_CTITEMCUSTFIELDS 

*Set data of item custom fields in extensionin 
TRY. 
  cl_cfd_bapi_mapping=>get_instance( )->map_to_bapiparex_multi( 
     EXPORTING ir_source_table = REF #( lt_poitem_custfields ) 
     CHANGING ct_bapiparex = lt_extensionin ). 
CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping. 
  CLEAR lt_extensionin[]. 
ENDTRY.

Pass LT_EXTENSIONIN to the BAPI

entry.title: SAP Academic Community Conference LAC 2025
entry.content:
Dear Academics part of SAP University Alliances,

We will be hosting our annual regional SAP Academic Community Conference for Latin America & Caribbean in June. We welcome you to save the date accordingly! More details coming soon - Stay tuned! ➡️

In case of questions or comments, leave them at the bottom of this post or write to us via universityalliances@sap.com

entry.title: ABAP - Creation of Warehouse Task with inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello

I search to create automatically Warehouse Tasks since an Inboud delivery

I tryed with /SCWM/TO_CREATE_WHR : 

tasks and Warehouse order are created and confirmed but the Inbound Delivery Status don't change

Perhaps I must launch another function but I don't find it

Can you help me ?

entry.title: Re: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, this is possible. The key is understanding how .getDimensionFilters() works. If ‘All’ is selected in the story filter, it returns a zero-length array. If any specific values are selected, it returns an array of length 1 containing a filter object. To access the selected values, you need to cast the filter object to either SingleFilterValue or MultipleFilterValue before you can access .value or .values. Although these casted objects have a .description property, it unfortunately remains an empty string (perhaps a bug), so it is necessary to then call .getMember() for the actual description.

Using a dynamic text element in a text box to display the story filter natively is more responsive, but the scripted approach allows greater customisation of how the text is displayed. For example, both the native dynamic text and the scripted approach preserve the order in which users select values. If they should always be sorted alphabetically, memberNames.sort() can be used before joining them. The separator can also be modified by adjusting .join(), or the approach can be changed entirely to display a count, such as “17 Business Units” instead of listing each name.

If your list of Business Units is not too long, performance could be improved by calling .getMembers() during story initialization to store all member IDs and descriptions in global variables. This would avoid repeated costly .getMember() calls each time the filter changes.

Here’s a script that will correctly update a textbox:

var displayText = "";

// Retrieve the dimension Story Filter.
// Do this on Application.getFileDataSource() as getDataSource() on a widget won't return the Story filter
var dimensionFilters = Application.getFileDataSource("YOUR_DATASOURCE_ID")
    .getDimensionFilters("BUSINESS_UNIT_DIMENSION");

// If 'All' is selected, the array will be empty
var dimensionFilter = dimensionFilters[0];

if (dimensionFilter === undefined) {
    displayText = "All Business Units";
} else {
    // Now cast to the appropriate filter type before .value or .values can be accessed.
    switch (dimensionFilter.type) {
        case FilterValueType.Single:
            var singleValue = cast(Type.SingleFilterValue, dimensionFilter);
            
            // Retrieve description via getMember() since .description is empty
            displayText = this.getDataSource()
                .getMember("BUSINESS_UNIT_DIMENSION", singleValue.value)
                .description;
            break;

        case FilterValueType.Multiple:
            var multipleValues = cast(Type.MultipleFilterValue, dimensionFilter).values;
            var memberNames = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);

            for (var i = 0; i < multipleValues.length; i++) {
                var memberDescription = this.getDataSource()
                    .getMember("BUSINESS_UNIT_DIMENSION", multipleValues[i])
                    .description;
                memberNames.push(memberDescription);
            }

            // Sort alphabetically before joining (optional)
            memberNames.sort();
            displayText = memberNames.join(", ");
            break;
    }
}

// Apply the text to the textbox
Text_1.applyText(displayText);

You would add this script to the onResultChanged event of an appropriate widget.

 

For additional detail on .getDimensionFilters() see: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/646826977afe4709af322461823b7872.html?locale=en-US&q=getDimensionFilters 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Create ABAP program to send SQL command to another HANA DB
entry.content: Hi Raymond ! It's a request from basis team in order to do this action in few hana DB with only 1 sql command. They already checked if we can do this with SQL console but is not possible. I mean, imagine you need to create one user in x hana DB you need to do this x times. This is the reason of my request.

entry.title: ERROR : HU Type does not Exist inn Warehouse Number
entry.content:
SOLUTION ::

GO TO SCM EXTENDED WHSE MANAGEMENT >>> EXTENDED WHSE MANAGEMENT >> CROSS PROCESS SETTINGS >> HANDLING UNIT >> DEFINE HU TYPES FOR EACH WHSE NO & ASSIGN HU TYPE GROUP.

IN THIS YOU HAVE TO ASSIGN YOUR WHSE NO & HU TYPE..

entry.title: HU Type does not Exist inn Warehouse Number
entry.content:
SOLUTION ::

GO TO SCM EXTENDED WHSE MANAGEMENT >>> EXTENDED WHSE MANAGEMENT >> CROSS PROCESS SETTINGS >> HANDLING UNIT >> DEFINE HU TYPES FOR EACH WHSE NO & ASSIGN HU TYPE GROUP.

IN THIS YOU HAVE TO ASSIGN YOUR WHSE NO & HU TYPE..

entry.title: Maintenance order link in CRMS4D_SERV_I?
entry.content:
Hello,

In S/4 HANA, where can I find the link to maintenance order from service order?
Tried CRMS4D_SERV_I and CRMS4D_SERV_H but found nothing....

I found a link from AFIH-SERVICE_DOC_ID to the service order, but not from starting in the service order tables.

Anyone knows? Need to start from the service to find the linked maintenance order, preferably on item level..

BR,

OT

entry.title: Sap Fiori Elements Tooltip for a field with a unit of measure is it possible?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a sap CAP Fiori Elements app, and in the object page I have a field that we would like to have a tool tip on it. My field in the Object Page looks originally like this, and it is a field with a unit of measure (using the annotation @Measures.Unit)

 

{
   $Type: 'UI.DataField',
   Value: sctcd,
}

 

this type does not support the annotation @Common.QuickInfo, I have found a work around for this using 

 

{	
   $Type : 'UI.DataFieldForAnnotation',
   Target: '@UI.DataPoint#fieldWithTooltip',
}

 

and 

 

UI.DataPoint #fieldWithTooltip: {
     Value               : sctcd,	
    ![@Common.QuickInfo]: 'tooltip text', 
}

 

as described in https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-feature-showcase?tab=readme-ov-file#adding-a-field-with-a-tooltip-to-a-table.

However, when using this work around, the unit of measure field stop working as expected because does not display the help option anymore.

Any options to achieve this using Fiori Elements?

Thanks,

Tatiana F.

The reason for your problem is that the service is in status "Starting". Try to click on stop then check if you can change the user to AlertSvc:

entry.title: About the Customer Onboarding Form
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
Our customer’s license is XXS, and as you all know, this license model does not include a separate QA system.

Since the SID information for the QA system is written as a separate system on the Customer Onboarding Form (COF), the form was not accepted on the TDD Assignment side, and they have requested a correction.

The question I would like to ask you is:
Do we have the possibility to correct the COF form created for the customer? If yes, I would appreciate your guidance on how to proceed.

Note: I also tried creating the form from scratch, but it did not ask for any system-related information on that form.

Thank you in advance for your help and support.

entry.title: Re: JBOSS 8 Compability
entry.content:
Hello,

I let Product Owner and R&D know about your info and they agreed the version info is incorrect in the PAM so they will change it, it takes time to make the changes due to internal processes but it will be updated...

Also, as you noted in the error you are getting, R&D confirmed the reason it's not working is due to the NameSpace change JBoss/WildFly did.

I've asked them to do the testing for the next release of Eclipse, unfortunately the release schedule for Eclipse is about once a year, typically in January, so for now no option to make this work on newer versions...

Maybe Tomcat is an option for you? I'll check with R&D and see if Tomcat works with this SP. I'm sure it will since SAP BOE/CR Server installs Tomcat as the default WEB server for that product.

Here's a link to CR for Eclipse PAM:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/09/ea59ef67-887c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

entry.title: Re: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content:
Just checked, and you can definitely make this substantially faster by preloading all Business Unit values during initialisation. One approach is to store them in two separate string arrays: one for the keys and one for the descriptions. When needed, you can find the index of a key in the first array and use it to access the corresponding description in the second array.

A cleaner approach I have used in other situations is to repurpose the ResultMemberInfo datatype for a global script variable. This allows you to efficiently store and retrieve Business Unit descriptions without repeatedly calling .getMember(). If using the ResultMemberInfo approach, your initialisation script would look something like this, assuming you have created the script variable BUs with type ResultMemberInfo:

if (BUs === undefined) {
    // First need to initialise the variable to access .properties
    BUs = cast(Type.ResultMemberInfo, {
        id: "1",
        properties: {
            INIT: "" // Placeholder property for initialisation
        }
    });
}

var buMembers = Chart_1.getDataSource().getMembers("BUSINESS_UNIT_DIMENSION", {limit: 1000});

for (var i = 0; i < buMembers.length; i++) {
    // Leverage the .properties object to store the descriptions by key
    BUs.properties[buMembers[i].id] = buMembers[i].description;
}

Once the key:description pairs have been stored in the properties object of the BUs variable during initialisation, the onResultChanged script can be significantly condensed. Instead of calling .getMember() repeatedly, we can simply retrieve the descriptions directly from BUs.properties, making the script significantly more efficient. The updated script would look like this:

var displayText = "";

// Retrieve the dimension filter
var dimensionFilters = Application.getFileDataSource("YOUR_DATASOURCE_ID")
    .getDimensionFilters("BUSINESS_UNIT_DIMENSION");

// If 'All' is selected, the array will be empty
var dimensionFilter = dimensionFilters[0];

if (dimensionFilter === undefined) {
    displayText = "All Business Units";
} else {
    switch (dimensionFilter.type) {
        case FilterValueType.Single:
            var singleValue = cast(Type.SingleFilterValue, dimensionFilter);
            
            // Retrieve description from preloaded properties
            displayText = BUs.properties[singleValue.value];
            break;

        case FilterValueType.Multiple:
            var multipleValues = cast(Type.MultipleFilterValue, dimensionFilter).values;
            var memberNames = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);

            for (var i = 0; i < multipleValues.length; i++) {
                // Retrieve description from preloaded properties
                memberNames.push(BUs.properties[multipleValues[i]]);
            }

            // Sort alphabetically before joining (optional)
            memberNames.sort();
            displayText = memberNames.join(", ");
            break;
    }
}

// Apply the text to the textbox
Text_1.applyText(displayText);

By using the preloaded BUs.properties object, this approach eliminates the costly .getMember() API calls, making the overall result just as fast as the native Dynamic Text approach in my testing.

 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: is there any TCODE for updating settlement date in multiple shipment cost documents?
entry.content:
I have to update settlement date in multiple shipment cost documents once in a month for processing of freight cost. I am doing it in VI02 or VI05. But this is done one by one for all cost documents which takes alot of time.

Is there any process or TCODE for updating same settlement date in multiple shipment cost documents at once?

entry.title: Streamlining Goods Movements from Reservations
entry.content:
Introduction

Efficiently managing goods movement is crucial for maintaining smooth operations in any business. With the latest development in reservations, you can now expedite your goods movement processes by posting a goods movement directly from a reservation. You can do this using the app Manage Material Documents for Reservations (App ID: F7279). 

Key Features 

The Manage Material Documents for Reservations app offers several functionalities to enhance your goods movement processes: 

  • Direct Posting: Post a goods issue directly from a reservation for supported movement types, such as Goods Issue to Cost Center (201) and Goods Issue for Order (261). 
  • Bulk Processing: Post goods issues for multiple items simultaneously, saving time and effort. 
  • Draft Management: Manage drafts of material documents to ensure accuracy before final posting. 

How-To Post a Goods Movement from a Reservation

Starting in the Manage Reservation Items app, choose a reservation with movement type 201 or 261. With the Create Goods Movement button, you will navigate to the Manage Material Documents for Reservations app where you can post your goods issue. 

Step-by-Step Procedure: 

  1. Select a Reservation: Begin by finding a reservation with a supported movement type, such as 201. 
  2. Initiate Goods Movement: Click on 'Create Goods Movement' from the table toolbar. 
  3. Adjust Details: In the Manage Material Documents for Reservations app, adjust the quantity if needed and add a storage location. 
  4. Add Items: To include additional items, click 'Add'. A pop-up will display possible reservation items. Select and add them to your material document. 
  5. Enhance Details: For each line item, you can add short text or serial numbers if applicable. Click 'Apply' to save changes. 
  6. Finalize Posting: Once all details are confirmed, click the 'Post Goods Issue' button to complete the process.

By following these steps, you can ensure a seamless and efficient goods movement process directly from reservations.

Click the image below to see the process in a how-to video:

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content: There's no metadata for that.

Kind Regards,

N. Karimli

entry.title: How is the Output Channel of a Purchase Order Determined?
entry.content:
When generating purchase orders output documents, whether they are created/changed/canceled for a specific supplier, the default output channel remains printer/fax/email, despite being configured as 'Do Not Send'.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How is the Output Channel of a Purchase Order Determi...
entry.content:
Cause: Output channel of a Purchase Order is determined in one of the below methods which are mentioned priority wise:

  1. The output channel you manually selected in purchase order via You can also -> Edit Output Settings for Created/Changed/Cancelled PO
  2. The output channel you maintained for purchase order in the respective supplier master data
  3. The output channel you maintained in Application and User Management, Output Channel Selection for Created/Changed/Cancelled PO

Resolution:

1.If you manually changed the output channel in purchase order via You can also -> Edit Output Settings for Created/Changed/Cancelled PO, system gives highest priority to it.

2.If no manual changes at purchase order level, system determines the output channel according to what you maintained for purchase order in the respective supplier master data, Communication tab, Collaboration subtab.

Note: In supplier master data, the output channel maintained for purchase order would valid to all of the Created/Changed/Cancelled PO. You can't specify channels separately.

3.If no output channels maintained for purchase order for the respective supplier, system determines the output channel according to the selection rule you maintained in Application and User Management, Output Channel Selection for Created/Changed/Cancelled PO.

You can also refer to KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/2678740

entry.title: Re: Change Package Transport layer - Public Cloud

I noticed that the global field name is empty, and so it seems in the ABAP logic to generate the excel template, the empty field is removed. so in the downloaded template we don't see the column. Would it be possible to share how customers can maintain names for the GFN?

3261750 - Manage Prices – Sales app: Extensibility for standard fields - SAP for Me asks users to create a customer influence request. Is there any other option?

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content:
I agree with @Sandra_Rossi 

AFAIK don't know any 'sure' metdata with this information (looked at transactions BAPI, SW01, SU24 for activity type)

Also some BAPIs require sequence such as
BAPI_PS_INITIALIZATION
BAPI_NETWORK_MAINTAIN
BAPI_PS_PRECOMMIT
BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT
or
BAPI_ALM_NOTIF_DATA_ADD
BAPI_ALM_NOTIF_SAVE
BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT
which BAPI is the 'update' one in second case?

202412

202502

entry.title: Re: JBOSS 8 Compability
entry.content: We have been running under JBoss 7 for some years so changing the application to use Tomcat 9 (The versions that still supports the Java EE 8 platform) would be a major rewrite. From my understanding Tomcat 10+ requires a more modern version of the EE naming to work. The CR runtime libraies seem to be the only ones that do not offer a modern version to support the latest app servers.

entry.title: Is there a way to only report on the most recently modified global information field in a story?
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I'm currently looking at reporting on our D&I data which has different fields based on location so is recorded in our global information field - however if someone has moved locations they have two entries in the global information therefore duplicating records - is there a way using filters to only bring in the most recently modified global information field?

 

I.e. if they set up a UK one on 1st Jan 2023 and a USA on on 1st Jan 2024 it would only show the USA one?

 

Thanks 🙂

entry.title: Re: error when trying to connect to public cloud connecti...

Armin

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
Hi all,

@crus_ch made a point but only works when Domain name and Data Element name are same. 

I made a change working for my solution. Both domain and data elements are identical and this works for me.

        DATA dataelem_name  TYPE sxco_ad_object_name  .
        
        FIND '_DM_' IN domain_name.
        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
            dataelem_name = domain_name.
            REPLACE FIRST OCCURENCE OF '_DM_' IN dataelem_name WITH '_DE_'.
        ELSE.
            dataelem_name = domain_name.
        ENDIF.

        CAST cl_abap_elemdescr( cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( dataelem_name ) )->get_ddic_fixed_values(

entry.title: In the Create Material app the Material Base Unit Of Measure - "Number" UoM is not available.
entry.content:
We need to assign UoM - Number but same is not available in dropdown.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: In the Create Material app the Material Base Unit Of...
entry.content:
This is possible through creating Custom Units of Measure (UoM). To create a custom UoM, it's required to create a ISO Code first then the Unit of Measure. Please follow these steps in order to do so:

Creating ISO Code:

  1. Access your CBC System or Manage Your Solution and go to SSCUI / Configuration Activity 102179 - '2. Units of Measurement'.
  2. Click 'ISO Codes' tab.
  3. Click 'New Entries' tab.
  4. Enter ISO code, example '1' and ISO code text 'Number'.
  5. Hit 'Save'.

Creating Unit of Measure:

  1. Access your CBC System or Manage Your Solution and go to SSCUI / Configuration Activity 102179 - '2. Units of Measurement'.
  2. Click 'Unit of Measure' tab at the bottom.
  3. Click 'Create' tab.
  4. Here create Internal UoM, example 'ZNU', Commercial, example 'ZNU', and Technical, example 'ZNUM.
  5. Then the Unit of Measure Text, example 'Number'.
  6. Then Enter ISO code '1'.
  7. Hit 'Save'.

NOTE: When creating custom units of measure always put 'Z' in front as (Custom Z) they are considered as Customer Customizing and are not effected by the Upgrade processes.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/adding-custom-units-of-measure/qaq-p/12384649

You should be then able to use Number as a UoM.

entry.title: Re: UI5ers Buzz #57: Recently Used Values History for Smart Controls
entry.content:
How do we clear the Recently Used values? The Clear button in settings does NOT clear them, the recently used values still show up (for smartfields).

We need to clear them because some of the descriptions have changes and the Recently Used items are confusing users. We click the Clear Button, but the old descriptions still show up.

Can you help please?

entry.title: Re: SAP User Roles and SAP Ariba User Groups
entry.content: Prem_Tracz, Thank you for your response! This explanation makes sense and aligns with what I was attempting to understand about the process. If I understand your explanation correctly, this process would not apply to normal SAP Roles, but becomes applicable for projects that will include both SAP ERP and SAP Ariba and has users that need to be in both systems. The extended roles are created in SAP ERP and also in SAP Ariba and then the master data for the user data can be imported from the SAP ERP and populate the peer groups in SAP Ariba with the applicable users. Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: There was an application error uploading custom attachment.
entry.content: Hi, we have the same issue, did you get a resolution? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud # Freezing Line
entry.content:
Hi Yogeshwar,

Yes you can change the colour of the line (but only the colour, nothing else about it unfortunately). You would do this with custom css in your story. First, add a custom css class to your table. I have used 'custom' for example:

Then in the custom css for your story, add code as follows:

 

.custom .sap-custom-table-freeze-lines {
	border-color: #FF6600;
}

 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Performance issue with Monitor Capacity Utilization App
entry.content:
Hi All

We are experiencing a performance issue when trying to open the resource utilization chart from the main page of the app. we have to click "wait" more than twice to launch the resource utilization chart.

This delay only occurs the first time the app is launched; subsequent attempts do not experience this issue. I found note 2795711 but it cannot be implemented for our release. Could you please let me know if anyone has faced this issue? Thanks in advance

Br/Adnan

entry.title: Re: New AIF tutorials for determining recipients
entry.content:
@alex_bundschuhis it possible to define a recipient for inbound EDI , via SOAP B2B web Service OrderRequest_In - Namespace /SDEDI, in such a way that a specific user can only see in the Message Monitoring Overview  Fiori App the inbound EDI orders for a specific sales organisation? 

I'm asking this because normally the sales organization is not something that the customer sends, therefore not present in the S/4 Inbound SOAP XML, and it is determined by entries in Configuration table EDSDC( transaction VOE2)

entry.title: Re: error when trying to connect to public cloud connecti...
entry.content: Hi @arminfarmani I will discuss with my respective basis team and proceed with the suggestion given by you. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How can we mass update SAPAPO Product group and PRODU...
entry.content: Hi. I couldn't find a way to add values to the fields via MASSD Product group Type [/SAPAPO/MATGRPTYPE] Product Group [/SAPAPO/GROUPVALUE] Can I get instructions?

entry.title: Re: Bad Request Error while creating SAP BTP Process Integration Runtime instance using Terraform
entry.content: Were you able to find a solution for this? Even I am getting BadRequest when trying to create process integration runtime resource. And even I noticed that the service is available in the ui entitlement but not visible when listed using data source in terraform.

entry.title: unable to create Source list for Intercompany
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

Kindly help me in this , as we are unable to create suddenly sourcelist for Intercompany .what could be the reason for such error..

entry.title: Re: I cannot post a VL01N material document because a com...
entry.content: Thank you Dominik I have managed to do the accounting. Entering the VL02N in the menu Treat - Take Ctd Pack as Delivery Ctd. Thank you for your help
